<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration; use function assert; use DOMDocument; use DOMElement; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class RemoveTestSuiteLoaderAttributes implements Migration { public function migrate(DOMDocument $document): void { $root = $document->documentElement; assert($root instanceof DOMElement); if ($root->hasAttribute('testSuiteLoaderClass')) { $root->removeAttribute('testSuiteLoaderClass'); } if ($root->hasAttribute('testSuiteLoaderFile')) { $root->removeAttribute('testSuiteLoaderFile'); } } }
